title: Handle clunger OOM kill and restart

log.context: Handle clunger OOM kill and restart

Done. Summary of findings:

**What happened:** clunger hit its 512M `MemoryMax` ceiling — peak memory before kill was 316.3M, but congress sessions 0053 and 0054 were both in flight simultaneously (created at 04:19 and 04:22, killed at ~04:23), likely spiking above the limit when serving concurrent LLM requests.

**Current state:** clunger is back up via systemd auto-restart, running at 55.8M, healthy.
